CLAIM-01.desc: default claim gates ship with the expected evidence-backed assertions

CLAIM-02.desc: tracked evidence verifies shipped default claims

CLAIM-03.desc: missing evidence blocks claims with actionable missing actions

CLAIM-04.desc: custom claim gates persist only to local runtime state

CLAIM-05.desc: MCP tools expose track_action, verify_claim, and register_claim_gate end to end

CLAIM-06.desc: verify:full includes the claim-verification proof lane and artifact
